zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay於大約1375年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯時，她的父親Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell51歲，母親Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas45歲。她於從大約1395年到1400年與David Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesay在英國蘇格蘭費伏法爾可藍德結婚。她去世於1421年5月1日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay于大约1375年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯时，她的父亲Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell51岁，母亲Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas45岁。她于从大约1395年到1400年与David Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesay在英国苏格兰費伏法爾可藍德结婚。她去世于1421年5月1日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay was born about 1375, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, was 51 and her mother, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, was 45. She married David Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesay from about 1395 to 1400, in Falkland, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom. She died on 1 May 1421, in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay est née environ 1375, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé David Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesay du environ 1395 au 1400, à Falkland, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1421, à Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans.

Sie hat von um 1395 bis 1400 in Falkland, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom David Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesay geheiratet. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1421 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesayが約1375年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで生まれた時，父Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwellは51歳，母Joanna Moray Countess of Douglasは45歳であった。から約1395年まで1400年にイギリススコットランドフィフファルクランドでDavid Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesayと結婚した。彼女は1421年5月1日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアディルレトンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay(이)가 대략 1375년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 대략 1395년 부터 1400년 까지 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 파클랜드에서 David Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesay(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1421년 5월 1일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 디를레턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com David Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesay de aproximadamente 1395 a 1400, em Falkland, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay родилась около 1375 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Stewart 1st Duke of Rothesay с около 1395 по 1400 в местности фалкланд, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла 1 мая 1421 г. в местности дирлетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет.
